introSection: Puppy Express is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Fajume currently owned by US carnival operator Prime Pacific Entertainment. It operates at the Wisconsin State Fair.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wacky Worm layout. Green track and red supports.

fullText:
Puppy Express is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Fajume currently owned by US carnival operator Prime Pacific Entertainment. It operates at the Wisconsin State Fair.

Wacky Worm layout. Green track and red supports.
